title: thesium sawae
intro: Thesium sawae, also known as the Alpine Thesium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Thesium genus. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and flatulence. The health benefits of Thesium sawae include its potential to improve gut health, boost the immune system, and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Thesium sawae often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or taken in capsule form.
